author: CZ 🔶 BNB
text:
Since the book launch, the community has been wild - memes, mini movies… also ranked people I love & hate (inaccurate btw) 😂

Hosting a live AMA on Binance Square tomorrow in 11 hours. Come ask anything. 10 signed copies will be given away during the session.

I spent 4 months in prison. An hour of spicy questions should be manageable.

📅 April 15 | 9pm GMT+8 
🔗 https://t.co/DMQUIT7oFY

card.title: Join Live Crypto Conversations with Top Creators on Square Audio Live
